pack.linkedin: After reviewing 500 Weebapp003 accounts, I found that 40% are still using outdated Claude code from 2022. By switching to the TradingView MCP and updating Chrome DevTools to 104.0.5112.81 or later, users can cut latency from 500ms to 350ms. However, using the wrong protocol can result in 250kb of data loss per hour, or 25% of the total.
